name: ricche-website
description: Ricche — AI Research Infrastructure for Financial Markets

scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:js && echo Build complete. Remember to bump CACHE_NAME in sw.js!
scripts.build:js: cp js/animations.js js/animations.min.js && cp js/main.js js/main.min.js && cp js/ai-network.js js/ai-network.min.js
